title: Release Package Script Settings
description: Release-Package.ps1 plugin settings. Publish plugins omit branches to run on every branch; add branches only to restrict (e.g. GitHub/DotNetNuGet on main). Semver comes from the DotNetReleaseVersion plugin (projectFiles).

plugins.name: Plugin module file name in CorePlugins (for example, DotNetPack -> CorePlugins/DotNetPack.psm1).
plugins.stageLabel: Execution phase: test, qualityGate, build, or release (lowercase). continueOnError is true only for release.
plugins.enabled: If true, the plugin is imported and Invoke-Plugin is called in the configured order.
plugins.DotNetReleaseVersion: First plugin in sample config: reads <Version> from the first DotNetReleaseVersion.projectFiles entry only; writes version to shared context.
plugins.project: DotNetTest plugin only. Path to the test project directory, relative to the script folder.
plugins.resultsDir: DotNetTest plugin only. Optional results directory path, relative to the script folder.
plugins.projectFiles: DotNetReleaseVersion: version source (first .csproj). DotNetPack / DotNetQualityGate: which projects to pack or scan (relative to Release-Package).
plugins.artifactsDir: DotNetPack: output directory for packages (relative to Release-Package). Engine default artifacts root is still ..\..\release when omitted here.
plugins.coverageThreshold: DotNetQualityGate plugin only. Coverage threshold percent (0 disables threshold check).
plugins.failOnVulnerabilities: DotNetQualityGate plugin only. If true, fail when vulnerable packages are detected.
plugins.githubToken: GitHub plugin only. Environment variable name containing the GitHub token used by gh CLI.
plugins.repository: GitHub plugin only. Optional owner/repo or GitHub remote URL. Leave empty to use remote.origin.url.
plugins.releaseNotesFile: GitHub plugin (or another notes consumer plugin) can define the release notes source file, relative to the script folder.
plugins.releaseTitlePattern: GitHub plugin only. Release title pattern. Supports {version} placeholder.
plugins.zipNamePattern: CreateArchive plugin only. Archive name pattern for packaged release assets. Supports {version} placeholder.
plugins.nugetApiKey: DotNetNuGet plugin only. Environment variable name containing the NuGet API key.
plugins.source: DotNetNuGet plugin only. Feed URL passed to dotnet nuget push.
plugins.includePatterns: CleanupArtifacts plugin only. File patterns to remove from artifactsDir (for example ['*.nupkg','*.snupkg']).
plugins.excludePatterns: CleanupArtifacts plugin only. File patterns to keep even when includePatterns match (for example ['*.zip']).
plugins.projectName: DockerPush: image path segment after registry.
plugins.contextPath: DockerPush: docker build context, relative to Release-Package folder.
plugins.pushLatest: DockerPush: also tag :latest. HelmPush: after helm push, oras copy chart to :latest (requires oras CLI on PATH; set false to skip).
plugins.images: DockerPush: [{ service, dockerfile }] relative to contextPath.
